# Titou Granier

> Event & Cultural Project Manager based in Paris, France. Specialized in exhibitions, luxury brand activations and international cultural productions.

## About

Titou Granier is an Event & Cultural Project Manager based in Paris. His work spans the full production lifecycle of cultural and luxury events: concept design, budgeting, logistics, international coordination, on-site delivery and post-event reporting. He has delivered projects ranging from intimate private gatherings to large-scale activations for 500+ attendees, across fashion, art, Web3, banking and institutional sectors.

## Expertise

- Event production and management
- Cultural project management
- Exhibition curation and production
- Luxury brand activations
- International coordination
- Art production
- NFT and Web3 events
- Budget and logistics management

## Notable Clients

LVMH, Balmain, KPMG, Renault, Binance, Arab Bank Switzerland, Institut Montaigne, Artverse, Ledger, Yellow Korner, NFT Factory, Paris Photo.
